name: hyperdirector
description: Hermes video director enhancement pack powered by HyperFrames. Turns articles, product pages, PRDs, README files, data charts, and brand materials into editable HyperFrames video projects and rendered MP4/WebM outputs. Use this skill when the user asks to create a video, make a short video, turn content into video, generate a video for WeChat / TikTok / YouTube, or mentions HyperDirector, video script, storyboard, or video template. User-facing video content (scripts, captions, CTA, on-screen copy) follows brief.language; default to zh-CN for Chinese users.
